---
title: "People"
subtitle: "The researchers and students behind DEN Economics Lab"
toc: false
---

## Advisory board

::: {.people-grid}
::: {.person-card}
[FH]{.person-avatar}

[Mochammad Firman Hidayat]{.person-name}

[Advisory board]{.person-role}
:::

::: {.person-card}
[AY]{.person-avatar}

[Arief Anshory Yusuf]{.person-name}

[Advisory board]{.person-role}
:::
:::

## Lead

::: {.people-grid}
::: {.person-card}
[KG]{.person-avatar}

[Krisna Gupta]{.person-name}

[Lead researcher · DEN]{.person-role}

[Macroeconomics, trade policy, CGE.]{.person-bio}
:::
:::

## Manager

::: {.people-grid}
::: {.person-card}
[SU]{.person-avatar}

[Sunni]{.person-name}

[Research manager]{.person-role}
:::
:::

## Senior researchers

::: {.people-grid}
::: {.person-card}
[AM]{.person-avatar}

[Alfan Mansur]{.person-name}

[Senior researcher]{.person-role}
:::

::: {.person-card}
[BM]{.person-avatar}

[Bertha Fania Maula]{.person-name}

[Senior researcher]{.person-role}
:::

::: {.person-card}
[PU]{.person-avatar}

[Putri]{.person-name}

[Senior researcher]{.person-role}
:::
:::

## Researchers

::: {.people-grid}
::: {.person-card}
[MA]{.person-avatar}

[Meizahra Afidatie]{.person-name}

[Researcher]{.person-role}
:::

::: {.person-card}
[TG]{.person-avatar}

[Timothy Kinmekita Ginting]{.person-name}

[Researcher]{.person-role}
:::

::: {.person-card}
[DP]{.person-avatar}

[Devy Pratiwi]{.person-name}

[Researcher]{.person-role}
:::

::: {.person-card}
[HA]{.person-avatar}

[M. Hafizh Ghifari Azizi]{.person-name}

[Researcher]{.person-role}
:::

::: {.person-card}
[SN]{.person-avatar}

[Shakuntala Anjani Nindraswari]{.person-name}

[Researcher]{.person-role}
:::
:::

## Interns

::: {.people-grid}
::: {.person-card}
[—]{.person-avatar}

[Intern]{.person-name}

[Open position]{.person-role}

[We are recruiting. See the [contact section](#join-the-lab) below.]{.person-bio}
:::
:::

## Join the lab {#join-the-lab}

We periodically take on research assistants and visiting scholars. If you are
working on Indonesian macroeconomics, trade, or applied policy and would like
to collaborate, get in touch:

- General inquiries: <den.econ@dewanekonomi.go.id>
- Lead researcher: <krisna@dewanekonomi.go.id>
- GitHub: [github.com/den-econ](https://github.com/den-econ)
</content>
</invoke>
